titleStmt.title: SII 15.614: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 614. (B.K. No. 81 of 1927-28.) ḌŌṆI, MUNDARGI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the pedestal of the Pārśvanatha image kept in front of the Māruti temple.
This is dated Śaka 1191, Śukla, Chaitra śu. °7, Monday, Mṛigaśīrsha, corresponding to 1269 A.D., March 11.

It records the installation of the image of Pārśvanātha in the basadi of Marudēvi-Avve of Kāṇūr-gaṇa. The image was a gift by Śrīkaraṇada Boppaṇṇa, grandson of Sēnabōva Ādaṇṇa. The donor is described as a lay-disciple of the teacher Bāḷachandra. At this time the whole of Karṇāta-maṇḍala is said to have been governed by Tipparāja.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti jinaśāsanāya . vidhunidhiharamitaśakagata śuklāb�sucaitramāsa si
tasapa myāṁ śaśivārē mṛgaśīrṣē saubhāgyē vṛṣabhalagnakē garajāyāṁ . boppaśrī
karaṇādhīśaḥ pārśvēśaṁ prātyatiṣṭhipat karṇnāṭa maṁḍaḷaṁ sarvvaṁ tipparājē praśā
sati . vubhayanayātmakatatvamanubhayagraṁthapramuktamala
dhārimuni prabhu bāḷacaṁdravacanadoḷabhinutagaṇakapradhāna bōpaṁ
tiḷidaṁ . śrīmatu malliseṭṭiya makkaḷu boppaseṭṭi sēnabōva Ādaṁṇna
na moṁmaṁ śrikaraṇada boppaṇnaṁ kāṇūrggaṇada marudēvi A
vveya basadige koṭṭīpāriśva pratime
Digital edition of SII 15.614 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
